name: union_list_list_empty_error_devalue
description: M3d CLAIMED: union list<int> | list<string> with a SCALAR 'hi'. Both arms SingleToArray-wrap; the int list's item is a PROVEN coerce_int error so it becomes [] (empty, ArrayItemParseError), while the string list becomes ['hi']. pick_best's list-vs-list rule devalues the empty-only-because-of-parse-error list, so ['hi'] wins. want live-captured from BAML final parse.
